notes: StoryChapterEditor modal with: title/synopsis/triggerPrompt editing, background preset selector (schoolRooftop/bedroom/park/cafe/fantasy/beach/night_city/temple) + custom URL, BGM type selector (gentle_piano/dramatic/upbeat/silent/emotional/battle), character pose selector (normal/smile/thinking/serious/crying/angry), choices editor (text/consequence/nextTease/xpReward), coin reward, visibility settings
Modal opens when clicking chapter title cell in stories table, uses requireRole('editor') auth
Schema fields used: bgmType (existing), characterPose (existing), choices (existing Json?)
Events page with list + create/edit form
Fields: characterId, title, description, content, startsAt, endsAt, isActive
AI企画ボタン calls /api/admin/characters/ai-event-plan POST with characterId
Status badges: 開催中/開始前/終了/無効 based on time & isActive
LimitedScenario schema: no bannerImage or coinReward field exists — content field used for scenario text
Nav item added to キャラクター管理 section with IconSparkle icon
